description: Quality-biased Birdeye meme-list recipes for graduation plays. These trade some raw recall for stronger tape and holder structure signals inside the provider filter ceiling.

recipes.name: grad_30m_volume5m
recipes.description: Fresh graduates ranked by immediate 5m dollar flow instead of simple recency.

recipes.name: grad_60m_trade5m
recipes.description: Graduates from the last hour ranked by active tape count, not just time.

recipes.name: grad_4h_volume1h
recipes.description: Higher-value graduates over four hours ranked by 1h volume with a holder floor.

recipes.name: grad_4h_holder_liquidity
recipes.description: Quality-biased post-grad scan for names that already have some holder breadth and survivable liquidity.

recipes.name: grad_75m_price30m_strength
recipes.description: Experimental continuation check for graduates still carrying real 30m price strength after the first burst.

recipes.name: grad_45m_volume30m_persistence
recipes.description: Experimental persistence scan for graduates still carrying enough 30m flow after the initial post-grad impulse.
